quote: There is only the Emperor, and he is our Shield and Protector.
speaker: Statement of fact, Second Book of Chantings

quote: Our thoughts light the Darkness that others may cross space. We are one with the Emperor, our souls are joined in his will. Praise the Emperor whose sacrifice is life as ours is death. Hail his name the Master of Humanity.
speaker: The Credo of the Astronomican
source: Warhammer 40,000: Rogue Trader, pg. 37; White Dwarf 93 (UK)

quote: For every battle honour, a thousand heroes die alone, unsung, and unremembered.
speaker: Unattributed

quote: What fear of death have we who know there is immortality in the great and noble deeds of men?
speaker: Unattributed

quote: Only in your deepest self is the truth of what you can be. And, without a doubt, that truth is terrible to bear.
speaker: Sensei Saying

quote: Be faithful! Be strong! Be vigilant!
speaker: The Emperor of Mankind

quote: Let the strength of your will match the stone of your walls.
speaker: Unattributed

quote: My will be done.
speaker: Unattributed

quote: A fortress is a living thing: the commander its brain, the walls its bones, the sensors its eyes and ears, the troops its blood, their weapons its fists…
speaker: Mordin Barr

quote: The warp is a vital tool to us, a means of communication and transport… Without it, there would be no Imperium of Man. It is a tool we use at our own risk.
speaker: Warmaster Horus (early Great Crusade era)
source: Horus Rising (Novel), Part One, ch. 10, pg. 198

quote: It’s amazing how much paperwork an act of heroism requires.
speaker: Commissar Ciaphas Cain
source: Ciaphas Cain: Hero of the Imperium (Omnibus), ch. 4

quote: Revenge is a dish best served with mayonnaise and those little cheesy things on sticks.
speaker: Osric the Loopy, Governor of Corania

quote: Contact with alien races always renews one’s faith in humanity. It is my belief that foreign travel narrows the mind wonderfully.
speaker: Helem Boesch

quote: If all else fails: duck. As a defensive stratagem it’s unreliable, but incredibly reassuring for a moment or two.
speaker: Lord Corvis of Petrax

quote: Never take a gamble you’re not prepared to lose.
speaker: Abdul Goldberg, Rogue Trader
source: For the Emperor (Novel) – Ciaphas Cain: Hero of the Imperium (Omnibus), ch. 14

quote: Should a machine not function upon striking the panel marked ‘on’… The operator must recourse to consulting the instruction manual.
speaker: Runic Spaceflight Manual W110E (Unattributed)

quote: If your battle plan’s working, it’s probably a trap.
speaker: Kolton Phae
source: The Traitor’s Hand (Novel), ch. 13 (Ciaphas Cain Omnibus)

quote: You can never have too many enemies. The more you’ve got, the more likely they are to get in each other’s way.
speaker: Jarvin Wallankot
source: The Traitor’s Hand (Novel), ch. 15 (Ciaphas Cain Omnibus), pg. 675

quote: If you don’t expect gratitude you’ll seldom be disappointed.
speaker: Eyor Dedonki
source: The Traitor’s Hand (Novel) – Ciaphas Cain: Hero of the Imperium (Omnibus)*, ch. 4, pg. 539

quote: One thing you can say for enemies; they make life more interesting.
speaker: Gilbran Quail, Collected Essays
source: The Traitor’s Hand (Novel), ch. 2 (Ciaphas Cain Omnibus), pg. 513

quote: Burn the heretic. Kill the mutant. Purge the unclean.
speaker: Imperial Inquisition (Unattributed Maxim)

quote: To be Unclean… To be Cleansed… This is the mark of the Mutant.
speaker: First Book of Indocrinations (Training Chant)

quote: Hate! Hate! Hate! Let it flow, let it run free!
speaker: Inspirational Verse, Imperial Hymnal Vol. IV

quote: The universe has many horrors yet to throw at us. This is not the end of our struggle. This is just the beginning of our crusade to save Humanity.
speaker: The Emperor of Mankind

quote: No pity! No remorse! No fear!
speaker: Chaplain Grimaldus (Referenced in broader Imperium lore)

quote: But without a purpose, an Astartes is nothing. A warrior without a war is no warrior at all.
speaker: Malcador the Sigillite
source: Garro: Oath of Moment (Audio Book), Track 5

quote: Suffer not the unclean to live.
speaker: Puritan Inquisitor (Unattributed)

quote: Faith without deeds is worthless.
speaker: Sister Miriya

quote: If a job’s worth doing it’s worth dying for.
speaker: Unattributed Proverb

quote: Blessed is the mind too small for doubt.
speaker: Imperial Creed (Unattributed)

quote: The Emperor protects.
speaker: Unattributed

quote: Success is commemorated; Failure merely remembered.
speaker: Unattributed

quote: Speed the bolt that brings the end of enemy and friend.
speaker: Unattributed

quote: Walk softly and carry a big Multi-melta.
speaker: Unattributed

quote: Wisdom is the beginning of fear.
speaker: Unattributed

quote: Only in death does duty end.
speaker: Imperial Guard Doctrine (Unattributed)

quote: Faith is our shield.
speaker: Unattributed

quote: Death before dishonour!
speaker: Unattributed

quote: Rejoice. Give thanks. For we are but one step now from triumph.
speaker: Canticles of Mars 79.12

quote: Thus do we invoke the Machine God. Thus do we make whole that which was sundered.
speaker: Hymn of Reforging

quote: And lo, shall Your holy steel be as armour around our souls, and shall Your wisdom guide our hands. No spear nor barb of the enemy shall trouble our flesh of iron.
speaker: Collected Logic-Psalms 31.3

quote: To every problem, a solution lies in the application of tech-lore.
speaker: Ferrarch Asklepian

quote: We are all but a weapon in the right hand of the Emperor.
speaker: Exhortationes Principiis Titannorum

quote: Faith is light, and where it burns, there is no night.
speaker: Life of Saint Hermeticus 5.23

quote: As all men must thank progenitors obscured by the past so we must endure the present that those who come after may continue the greater work.
speaker: Garba Mojaro, Prefectus

quote: In ancient times, men built wonders… But we are much wiser now.
speaker: Archmagos Ultima Cryol

quote: Let chime ring out! Part the veil of circuit and gear. For now is the hour of motion.
speaker: Canticles of Rousing (excerpt)

quote: Toll the Great Bell Thrice! Sing Praise to the God of All Machines.
speaker: Catechism of the Autoculus of Mars

quote: It’s not work if you enjoy it.
speaker: Colloquialisms Minor Chapter 51

quote: Such sweet music is the chatter of binary, that has no tongue to lie.” (Mirroring Sayings of the Archmagi Appendix 4)
speaker: Flavius Binary (paraphrased)

quote: Prayer has power, but I cannot deny fire does, too.
speaker: Sayings of Archmagos Cortiko v.58

quote: Look not upon the alien, for the alien looks back.
speaker: Unknown (another Mechanicus proverb)

quote: The supporting fire of one’s brethren is always a comfort. Provided it doesn’t hit oneself.
speaker: Grand Master Thordun Ranxey

quote: The tree of heresy persists where its roots be not torn up.” (Darkly wry advice for thoroughness.)
speaker: Jovian Commentaries Ch. 59

quote: The foe of reason builds monuments to his madness, and reveals himself thereby.
speaker: Malcador (credited)

quote: Our enemies may rest, but rust never sleeps.
speaker: Tech-Priest Jung

quote: The Tech-Priest tends his flock of Chimeras and lasguns as surely as his priestly brethren tend the souls of their Guardsmen…
speaker: Magos Aubrey Bessemer

quote: The Omnissiah demands the stain of the xenos be deleted. Where it remains, the Omnissiah rages.
speaker: Opus Fulminata

quote: Annihilation. Not exile, submission, or subjugation. For the xenos, only annihilation.
speaker: Life of Fabricator General Kane 56.90

quote: From such small heresies are great apostasies made.
speaker: Maxims Metalica 76.12

quote: Then into the teeth of the enemy we shall stride.
speaker: Life of Macharius 23.19

quote: Not all data should be acquired.” (Implying some truths are so damning they must be destroyed.)
speaker: Ferro-Dictates 53.12

quote: Death is here!… Death! By the Machine God, Death is here!
speaker: Magos Varnak (Last Words)

quote: Our only objective should be death to the alien and all his works. All else is deviance from the Omnissiah Creed.
speaker: Life of Archmagos Borasis Appendix 9

quote: The weak in mind will seek to understand the xenos. The strong in mind will destroy them, and bless their ignorance.
speaker: Binary Hierarch Gethsemorr

quote: When the heretic is silenced, it is as if his weapons and tools are stripped from him… He is left impotent and weak.
speaker: Jovian Ministrations 61.90

quote: All shall be darkness, all shall be madness, for everything will be known and nothing forbidden.
speaker: Fabricator-General Jaegaron

quote: Seek not the words of the xenos, lest they infect us with blasphemy.
speaker: Admonitions Mechanae 3:16

quote: When we muse on the works of the enemy, we invite him into our minds.
speaker: Canticles Flamminia 713

quote: The Lord of Mars is with us in the dark, even if thou knowest it not.
speaker: Exaltations 49

quote: Better safe and ignorant, than rueing the means of our downfall.
speaker: Macharian Notions Ch. 4113

quote: Beware the deviance of thine own tools.
speaker: Maxims of Amalanth 5.12

quote: The xenos must be purged, for the stars are humanity’s birthright.
speaker: Psalms Hermeticus 46

quote: One can verge from the standard form, but… must always retain humanity, or be lost to the Men of Iron.
speaker: Text of the Oiled Cog v.12

quote: By acuteness of mind shall we find victory.
speaker: Fabricator-General Explicatus

quote: Fury has its uses.
speaker: Fury Has Its Uses (Unknown)

quote: When the enemy begs for destruction, do not let him go hungry.
speaker: Helfirian Recollections Ch. 571

quote: They shall be my finest warriors… They will be my Space Marines, and they shall know no fear.
speaker: The Emperor of Mankind
source: The Horus Heresy Book One – Betrayal, pg. 26

quote: Into the fires of battle! Unto the anvil of war!
speaker: Battle-cry of the Salamanders

quote: We march for Macragge! And we shall know no fear!
speaker: Ultramarines Battle-chant

quote: What is it to be a Space Marine? It is to be death! … What is it to end life? It is an honour, to be the executioners of the Emperor.
speaker: Catechism of Hate (Novella)

quote: Bravery is stronger than Adamantium… We have the courage of the Emperor! And in the Emperor’s name… ATTACK!!
speaker: Chaplain Gonzago (Imperial Fists)
source: Warhammer 40,000 Compendium, pg. 22; Warhammer Siege, pg. 109

quote: While the enemies of the Emperor still draw breath, there can be no peace.
speaker: Captain Gabriel Angelos, Blood Ravens

quote: I haven’t lost an arm, brother. It’s right over there.
speaker: Captain Alessio Cortez, Crimson Fists

quote: Treat them with honour, my Brothers. Not because they will bring us victory this day, but because their fate will one day be ours.
speaker: High Chaplain Astorath (Blood Angels)

quote: We give hope. Ever has it been that the Space Marines are too few to conquer every threat… Yet the truth of our existence steels the hearts of lesser warriors.
speaker: Chaplain Ortan Cassius (Ultramarines)

quote: We follow in the footsteps of Guilliman. As it is written in the Codex, so shall it be.
speaker: Primarch Roboute Guilliman (Ultramarines)

quote: Don’t fool yourselves. War is all we are! Killing is all we are good for! The rest is delusion.
speaker: Devastator Sergeant Avitus (Blood Ravens)

quote: -The Emperor protects. -And having a loaded bolter never hurt, either.
speaker: Brother Proteus & Apothecary Pythol (Ultramarines)

quote: Problems? There is no problem I cannot solve with this…
speaker: Commander Mad Chainsaw Johnson (White Scars)

quote: Show me a fortress and I’ll show you a ruin.
speaker: Captain Eddan Bourne (Silver Skulls)

quote: We go where we wilt. We slay who we wilt. Let the Emperor judge the righteousness of our deeds.
speaker: Sergeant D’Kestrel (Raven Guard)

quote: Come you aliens, show me what passes for fury amongst your misbegotten kind!
speaker: Captain Gabriel Angelos (Blood Ravens)

quote: At Lastrati we gathered every Whirlwind in the Crusade… Moments later the city was aflame, its defenders broken, and the battle truly joined.
speaker: Ancients Tahncred & Androcles (Various Chapters)

quote: The roar of engines, the recoil of cannons. That is where the true joy of battle lies.
speaker: Sergeant Antaro Chronus (Ultramarines)

quote: Earth is the hub of the Imperium… And the most corrupt… where there is government and where there is money, there is corruption.
speaker: Wolf Priest Ranek Icewalker (Space Wolves)

quote: The lives of millions, and the honour of our Chapter, hang in the balance, brothers. Failure is not an option.
speaker: Captain Androcles (Star Phantoms)

quote: Give me a hundred Space Marines. Or failing that, give me a thousand other troops.
speaker: Rogal Dorn, Primarch of the Imperial Fists

quote: Here we stand and here shall we die, unbroken and unbowed, though the very hand of death itself come for us, we will spit our defiance to the end!
speaker: Chaplain-Dreadnought Armand Titus (Howling Griffons)
source: Imperial Armour Volume Nine – The Badab War (Part One), pg.124

quote: Kill! Maim! Burn! Kill! Maim! Burn!
speaker: Khârn the Betrayer (Noted Pre-Heresy)

quote: War is not about glory. War is about victory!
speaker: Apothecary Pythol (Ultramarines)

quote: We are the slayers of kings, the destroyers of worlds… Let none stay our wrath.
speaker: Captain Cato Sicarius (Ultramarines)

quote: Surround yourself with the greatest warriors at your command… It matters not. I shall take your head for the Great Khan and for the Emperor.
speaker: Kor’sarro Khan (White Scars)

quote: We are the Emperor’s angels of death, not his angels of mercy.
speaker: Blood Ravens Devastator Sergeant Avitus

quote: They know our tactics… So we must cast them aside for a day. We must fight them in ways they do not expect.
speaker: Sergeant Aeonid Thiel (Ultramarines)

quote: Flesh is weak. Only the machine is eternal.
speaker: Iron Hands Principle

quote: We do not know what our chances of survival are, so we fight as if they were zero.
speaker: Grey Knights Justicar Alaric

quote: Everything has a purpose, Proteus. So the Emperor ordains.
speaker: Chaplain Carnak (Imperial Fists)

quote: Through the destruction of our enemies do we earn our salvation!
speaker: Blood Ravens Librarian Saying

quote: From the darkness we strike: fast, silent, and deadly.
speaker: Raven Guard Maxim

quote: Walls of stone and walls of iron, fall down all the same.
speaker: White Scars Battle-Hymn

quote: Only the spirit is pure. The mind may be swayed, the body may fail.
speaker: Iron Hands Credo

quote: Many great legends lived before Brother Rammius, but most are unmourned and unremembered.
speaker: Techmarine Simagus (Black Templars)

quote: Or is it to lie, to hide and to plot so that others will never know of our shame?
speaker: Dark Angels Interrogator-Chaplain Boreas

quote: Victory does not always rest with the big guns: but if we rest in front of them we shall be lost.
speaker: Silver Skulls Commander Argentius

quote: If all else fails: duck. As a defensive stratagem it’s unreliable…
speaker: Lord Corvis of Petrax (referenced by Marines)

quote: I am the Arch-fiend, the Despoiler of Worlds, and by my hands shall the false Emperor fall.
speaker: Abaddon the Despoiler
source: Codex: Chaos Space Marines (6th Edition), pg. 57

quote: Horus was weak. Horus was a fool. He had the whole galaxy within his grasp and he let it slip away.
speaker: Abaddon the Despoiler
source: Codex: Chaos Space Marines (3rd Edition), pg. 44

quote: The Emperor protects. Kill every last one.
speaker: Abaddon the Despoiler
source: The Last Son of Dorn (Novel), ch. 8

quote: And what are the achievements of your fragile Imperium? It is a corpse rotting slowly from within while maggots writhe in its belly… I have forgotten nothing, and my wisdom has expanded far beyond mere mortal frailties.
speaker: Ahzek Ahriman (Thousand Sons)

quote: If the path to salvation leads through the halls of purgatory, then so be it.
speaker: Ahzek Ahriman (Thousand Sons)
source: Codex: Chaos Space Marines (6th Edition), pg. 60

quote: If a man dedicates his life to good deeds and the welfare of others, he will die unthanked and unremembered… Infamy is always more preferable to ignominy.
speaker: Fabius Bile (Emperor’s Children)
source: Codex: Chaos Space Marines (4th Edition), pg. 53

quote: I am Alpharius. I am Alpharius. We are all Alpharius.
speaker: Alpha Legion

quote: They must not err, or they fall to heresy. All who fall join our cause… Chaos is inevitable. We lurk within the darkness of their souls, on the tip of their tongues, in their tortured dreams. We are them, but freed from the shackles of ignorance. We are them, but so much more!
speaker: Diuman Cilious (Alpha Legion)

quote: The difference between gods and daemons depends largely upon where one stands at the time.
speaker: Argel Tal (Word Bearers)

quote: For years I have despised Lorgar… We no longer bear the word, my friend. We bear Lorgar.
speaker: Sorot Tchure (Word Bearers)
source: Know No Fear (Novel), ch. Eight, pg. 101

quote: We’re back, and better than ever!
speaker: Chaos Space Marines (Unattributed)

quote: Do you hear the voices too?!!
speaker: Chaos Aspiring Champions

quote: We’re so loud you wanna die. Go forth and amplify!
speaker: Noise Marines

quote: Yes! Let the blood flow!… Once the Titan is mine, you will all worship me as you do the Gods!
speaker: Crull, Warlord of the World Eaters
source: Dawn of War: Winter Assault (paraphrased lines)

quote: Great art so often fails to find an audience with the intellect to appreciate it. Sometimes I am filled with woe to think no one in this blighted millennium has the wit to see the scope of my brilliance.
speaker: Fabius Bile

quote: Sanity is for the weak!
speaker: Chaos Space Marines (Unattributed)

quote: Sometimes a man can be convinced to do anything, no matter how abhorrent, with the right motivation. We are just here to provide that motivation—by force or temptation.
speaker: Kor Phaeron

quote: Do you really think I’m doing this to try and impress anyone? I know who I am, and I don’t give a greenskin’s fart what anyone thinks of me.
speaker: Honsou (Iron Warriors)

quote: I murdered thousands for the Emperor and he gave me nothing… Now his lapdogs yap for every life I take. Let them yap—I’ve got the gods on my side.
speaker: Svane Vulfbad

quote: Destroy, for the sake of Destruction. Kill, for the sake of Killing.
speaker: Noise Marines
source: Codex: Chaos Space Marines (4th Edition), pg. 83

quote: Let the galaxy burn!
speaker: Abaddon the Despoiler
source: Referenced across Chaos Space Marine contexts

quote: Death to the false Emperor!
speaker: Chaos Space Marines (Unattributed)
source: Codex: Chaos Space Marines (4th Edition), pg. 4

quote: Death is nothing compared to vindication.
speaker: Primarch Konrad Curze (Night Haunter)

quote: I have become that which I once most feared: Death itself.
speaker: Kargos Bloodspitter, Champion of Khorne

quote: Burn the body; sear the soul.
speaker: Noise Marines
source: Codex: Chaos Space Marines (4th Edition), pg. 82

quote: I am doomed, but I walk in darkness. I am forgotten, but the future is my gift to humanity… after it’s bathed in blood.
speaker: Svane Vulfbad

quote: Kill us! Kill us all! In the name of Terra, before he—” (last frantic cry, cut off by horrifying fate)
speaker: Heritor Asphodel

quote: With the thirty-seven keys of Tzeentch, we open the way… With the mighty axe of Khorne, we cut open the world for them.
speaker: Word Bearers Chant
source: Dawn of War: Dark Crusade (Chaos stronghold prelude)

quote: Horus was weak.
speaker: Abaddon the Despoiler
source: Codex: Chaos Space Marines (3rd Edition), pg. 44

quote: We are the destroyer!
speaker: Chaos Space Marines (Unattributed)

quote: Let sensation wash over you, through you, claim you and cast you aside!
speaker: Noise Marines
source: Codex: Chaos Space Marines (8th Edition), pg. 48

quote: Do you hear the voices too?!?
speaker: Chaos Aspiring Champions

quote: The Imperium is a weak old man, ready and waiting to be broken apart by his vengeful sons.
speaker: Lufgt Huron (Tyrant of Badab)
source: Codex: Chaos Space Marines (6th Edition), pg. 58

quote: Seven months… We ate the crew… hateful mouthfuls… We drank promethium…
speaker: Argel Tal

quote: Slaughter everything and everyone until they kneel in the ashes of those they sought to protect.
speaker: Haakor (Black Legion)
source: Codex: Chaos Space Marines (8th Edition), pg. 130

quote: In Nurgle’s embrace, we do not fear decay—decay becomes our greatest strength.
speaker: Typhus the Traveler

quote: Which of you will be the first course?
speaker: Lucius the Eternal
source: Codex: Chaos Space Marines (6th Edition), pg. 62

quote: Only when you have soared through the morning skies on wings of flame can you understand the Hawk… And only one who has travelled but ultimately turned away from each of these paths can understand the Autarch.
speaker: Anthrillien Morningchild, Autarch of Yme-Loc

quote: Every moment of anger, hate, deceit, pain, suffering, pleasure, and desire is mirrored in the power of Chaos. When its legions march, they march to return upon us a ruin that is of our own making.
speaker: Arenal, Farseer
source: FFG Teaser for “The Final Gambit” (Conquest Card Game)

quote: Attack swiftly, and without warning. This is the mantra of the Striking Scorpions – it is the way of all our kind.
speaker: Aulirel Doomhand, Striking Scorpion Exarch
source: Planetary Empires Strategy Card (Careful Planning), archived 2011

quote: They shall come, expecting the obvious, the simple, the artless. Meanwhile, we shall appear unseen from ten directions, and from every one strike a fatal blow.
speaker: Farseer Caerys of Ulthwé

quote: I hear the song of the celestial heavens, and the music is cacophonous. Righting the discord of the universal opus is what has given my people purpose when we should have collapsed in upon ourselves.
speaker: Farseer Taldeer, Craftworld Ulthwé

quote: The wind whipping across your face as your blades whip across the throats of the foe. It makes the blood sing.
speaker: Hrythar Dreamweave, Wild Rider

quote: There is no corner of the galaxy that has not felt the eagle-keen gaze of Alaitoc.
speaker: Elarique Swiftblade, Autarch of Alaitoc

quote: Gather the dead for war, let them join our ranks, lest we are forced to join theirs.
speaker: Farseer Kelmon

quote: The gaze of Alaitoc sees all; there will be no escape for you.
speaker: Eldorath Starbane

quote: Feel the rush of the wind against your skin and hear her keening cry in your ears. We are the Wild Riders, the children of the storm!
speaker: Nuadhu ‘Fireheart’

quote: Ask not the Eldar a question, for they will give you three answers, all of which are true and terrifying to know.
speaker: Anonymous Eldar Maxim

quote: You say we are random and capricious, we say you are vulgar and idiotic… Some of you call us your allies. You are not allies, any more than a butcher’s knife is his ally.
speaker: Captured Eldar Ranger (Last Words)

quote: We warned you of the price of your actions, now you must pay it in full – in blood.
speaker: Message Received Prior to the Assyri Devastation

quote: Beauty and sensuality are virtues that can be expressed in bloodshed just as easily as in song… To an unfettered Eldar mind there is neither sanity nor madness, merely a wave of perfect existence.
speaker: Ralamine Mung, Ordo Xenos (re: Eldar)

quote: Ask not what the Eldar want of you—because the answers you receive will fracture your mortal sanity.
speaker: Inquisitor Czevak

quote: Death and Fate have taken the stage. In war there is poetry; in death, release.
speaker: Unattributed Harlequin

quote: Trust not in their appearance… There is no understanding them, for there is nothing to understand—they are a random force in the universe.
speaker: Abriel Hume, Imperial Commander

quote: What she showed me was indescribable. Just as well, as I’d sooner die than be forced to describe it.
speaker: Eoheran Quilherna
source: Wrath & Glory – Aeldari: Inheritance of Embers, pg. 49

quote: I come to dance the Dance of Death.
speaker: Unknown Harlequin

quote: You may as well try to catch starlight as bring Eldar to battle.
speaker: Unattributed (Eldar & Allies)

quote: We bring only death, and leave only carrion. It is a message even a Human can understand.
speaker: Requiel of the Sons of Fuegan

quote: Eldrad has seen the stars stained red with your blood, and it pleases him! You think us weak, but we will be your doom, children of Earth.
speaker: Captured Eldar Ranger (Last Words)

quote: Behold, the fiery destroyer of worlds. I walk again, a god among mere mortals.
speaker: Avatar of Khaine

quote: No barrier, no enemy will thwart my purpose. This night I bring him the dream of death!
speaker: Lord-Phoenix Dreamspinner (Iyanden)

quote: War is my master; Death my mistress.
speaker: Phoenix Lord Maugan Ra

quote: Make no mistake, Human. We do not fight for your Emperor. We fight against Horus.
speaker: Lord-Phoenix Madallaith, Biel-Tan

quote: Patience is a virtue duly rewarded; now is the time of blood. Slaughter them all, in Khaine’s name!
speaker: Skariel the Huntress (Striking Scorpion)
source: Wrath & Glory – Aeldari: Inheritance of Embers, pg. 28

quote: Let them gather the wreckage of their precious tank. It would please me to destroy it a second time.
speaker: Querosq the Lambent, Fire Dragon
source: Wrath & Glory – Aeldari: Inheritance of Embers, pg. 26

quote: I have trespassed in the realm of daemons and seen the things within. You cannot fathom the price we pay to deliver death to our foes.
speaker: Reborn Yrule, Warp Spider
source: Wrath & Glory – Aeldari: Inheritance of Embers, pg. 30

quote: Heed our warning or your souls shall echo their final lament in the warp, forever.
speaker: Unknown Eldar (Pre-battle curse)

quote: I walk again, a god among mere mortals.
speaker: Avatar of Khaine

quote: I have seen the future, and it is death.
speaker: Avenelle, Farseer

quote: May the winds of fate guide my sword.
speaker: Baharroth

quote: They think they are safe. I am a servant of death, and they have underestimated my reach.
speaker: Dismali, Dark Reaper
source: Wrath & Glory – Aeldari: Inheritance of Embers, pg.24

quote: The stars themselves once lived and died at our command.
speaker: Farseer Mirehn Bielann

quote: A craftworld is a sentient being, with a hundred thousand minds.
speaker: Inquisitor Czevak

quote: I bring only death and leave only corpses.
speaker: Jain Zar (Phoenix Lord)
source: FFG Teaser for “Against the Great Enemy” (Conquest)

quote: The dead must join our ranks, lest we be forced to join theirs.
speaker: Prince Yriel, Autarch of Iyanden

quote: In war there is poetry; in death, release.
speaker: Unknown Harlequin

quote: Though my body dies, I will remain. Evermore.
speaker: Death Chant, Eldar Soul-Graft

quote: Some say that perfection is the enemy of the good. They speak nonsense… We should never cease our striving for greatness. Anything else is nothing but stagnation.
speaker: Shas’o Arra’kon
source: Psychic Awakening: The Greater Good, p. 66

quote: Beneath the protective umbrella of the shield relay, we are all but untouchable. Once more, our science and enlightenment bring us closer to our ultimate aims.
speaker: Aun’Cho
source: Planetary Empires Strategy Card (Energy Shield Relay)

quote: How ironic it is that as fast as we spread progress and hope throughout the galaxy, the Tyranids spread death and despair. Only united can we hope to stand against them.
speaker: Aun’shi

quote: It is as we join with others, in a way that only the Tau can, that we find ourselves able to fully realize our true potential. And that is the final source of our hopes and intentions.
speaker: Aun’el T’au Tam’ya
source: Codex: Tau (3rd Edition), p. 27; Tau Empire (4th), p. 15

quote: It is not our technology that will enable us to prevail in this galaxy. It is our shared sense of honour and commonality of cause that unites us and will give us the power to defeat our enemies.
speaker: Shas’el Sa’cea Or’es
source: Codex: Tau (3rd Edition), p. 32; Tau Empire (4th), p. 8

quote: To follow any path other than the Tau’va is to doom us all. Only together and with courage and discipline shall we stand victorious.
speaker: Commander Shadowsun

quote: Those with superior reach can dictate the terms of battle and impose their will upon their foe. Remember, the first step on the path to victory is often the most important.
speaker: Commander Puretide

quote: Each must find their own way. If those in our heartland had witnessed the savageries of the void as have we, they would know this… None will join their strength together just to see their ancient enemies prosper.
speaker: Commander Farsight

quote: The alien is not intrinsically evil. Do not hate him. Pity him his ignorance… Seek to understand his differences and acquaint him with his inadequacies. Only then will he accept his place in the Greater Good.
speaker: O’Mau’tel

quote: Our Conquest is inevitable, our ascension a matter of time. Let none who are wise deny our destiny.
speaker: Aun’Va
source: Codex: Tau Empire (7th Edition), “The Tau Empire”

quote: We admire their strength. We honour that strength as we consume their meat. You humans are not so strong, but you are tenacious, and your meat is more palatable than Orkflesh.
speaker: Shaper Lok Ch’kreen (Kroot)
source: Only War: Enemies of the Imperium, p. 95

quote: One of their light walkers carried a weapon of lethal effect… The tiny munition had passed through the vehicle with such speed that everything within the hull… had been sucked out. Including the crew.
speaker: Major Kane, Mordant 607th

quote: Our tanks were useless… All I could see were trails of fire where the projectiles had ignited the air. Emperor’s mercy!
speaker: Guardsman Cauley, 25th Graian Rifles

quote: You humans do not understand. You feed upon weak things… We feed upon the strong, because we desire to make our children stronger.
speaker: Kroot Mercenary Chal’ka Nok
source: Rogue Trader: Edge of the Abyss, p. 66

quote: The first rule of unarmed combat is: don’t be unarmed.
speaker: Unknown Academy Instructor (Tau)

quote: A good warrior strikes fast, but retreats faster.
speaker: Fire Caste Maxim

quote: Living armour happens.” (Likened to the human saying “Grox dung happens.”)
speaker: Bitter Tau Remark

quote: No expansion without equilibrium. No conquest without control. Pursue success in serenity and service to the tau’va.
speaker: Shas’O T’au Shi’ur (Meditation)

quote: They got ded big shooty guns dat’ll kill tons of boyz, but if yer can get near ’em then you’ve got a chance… just gotta make sure you bring loads of boyz, coz you ain’t gonna have a whole lot left when you get close enough ta crump ’em.
speaker: Warlord Skamork, the Great Despoiler (re: Tau)

quote: I do not fear death. Death fears ME!
speaker: Shas’O Sa’cea Dre’koran Ta’ar

quote: Learn to shorten your reach! If your foe can come close enough to negate your striking power, all stratagem is lost, and when all stratagem is lost, the battle is lost.
speaker: O’Shovah (Commander Farsight)

quote: A thousand fibres connect each of us with our fellow Tau… Everything we do must be in furtherance of the Greater Good lest we return to the Mont’au, the Terror.
speaker: Shas’O Vior’la Kais
source: Codex: Tau (3rd Edition), p. 26; Tau Empire (4th), p. 5

quote: Never have I faced a tide of foes that can alter both strategy and flesh to hasten our downfall. Swift as these beasts adapt, we must be swifter, or the Tau Empire will drown in its own blood.
speaker: Shas’El Vorcah of Kel’shan

quote: No expansion without equilibrium. No conquest without control.
speaker: Shas’O T’au Shi’ur

quote: Fight with fire and courage, and nothing can stand against us.
speaker: Commander Shadowsun

quote: Our earth-caste brothers have provided us with the means to destroy our foe. Utilize the sensor array and rain death on the greenskin invaders.
speaker: Shas’O Vorsheem

quote: See the Gue’la, how they arrogantly stride into our trap. We will punish their belligerence, their ignorant lack of foresight.
speaker: O’Sharrek (Commander Darkwind)

quote: What are secrets with no-one to know them?
speaker: Shas’O R’th

quote: I have received your messages… If you wish to gain similar rights you must submit yourselves to his wisdom as members of the Tau empire.
speaker: Por’el Tau’n Ukos
source: Codex: Tau (3rd Edition), p. 25; Tau Empire (4th), p. 39

quote: Even when broken, a sword may still cut.
speaker: Aun’ko’vash

quote: It burns so briefly, the light of my children, so briefly. But by the Greater Good, it burns so bright!
speaker: Aun’Va

quote: The question of timing… Once decided, it must be pursued with utmost energy.
speaker: Commander Puretide

quote: A well-maintained warrior is an effective warrior.
speaker: Unknown Meditation

quote: We do not belong on the ground. Our home is the sky.
speaker: Air Caste Philosophy

quote: Today… we fight for the Greater Good! And we will triumph!
speaker: Aun’el Shi’Ores
source: Dawn of War: Dark Crusade (Tau stronghold intro)

quote: The one constant in the universe is change. The wise adapt. Believe in our destiny.
speaker: Transcript from an Alien Probe

quote: The feeling of power from a battlesuit can be intoxicating. Remember your duty.
speaker: Commander Shadowsun

quote: There are two kinds of conduct… The first is a failure to reflect upon the Greater Good. The second is the refusal to follow it.
speaker: Por’ui Dal’yth Ukos

quote: We is gonna stomp da universe flat and kill anyfink that fights back. We’re da Orks, and we woz made ta fight and win.
speaker: Ghazghkull Mag Uruk Thraka

quote: OI! Lissen ta me wen I’z talkin’ to ya! We’z gonna go on ‘dere ship, smash it up an’ kill anyfing dat gets in our way, an’ den we’z gonna get back on da boat. Dat’ll show ‘em. WAAAGH!
speaker: Gorgal ’edkicker
source: Rogue Trader: Into the Storm, pg. 66

quote: We’ve got our Gargantz an’ we’ve got our weapons… We’s gonna give da Humies a taste of ‘ot metal death.
speaker: Warlord Dragnatz

quote: Evil Sunz like two fings most: Goin’ fast an’ krumpin’ stuff. Dat’s why we’z so good at it.
speaker: Lugnut of the Bladed Wheels

quote: Dis here is Warboss Hedkrakka… Dis is Hedkrakka’s land now an’ we’z all comin’ to see you’z next! I need some grayskins for me boss-hut!
speaker: Warboss Headkrakka

quote: Operate! Operate! Still time to operate!
speaker: Mad Dok Grotsnik

quote: Live off da land. Go find war. Kill wot comes close. Da old ways are best.
speaker: Grodd, Snakebite Runtherd

quote: Da only good ’ooman is a dead ’ooman. An’ da only fing better than a dead ’ooman’z a dyin’ ’ooman who tells ya where ta find ’is mates.
speaker: Morglum Necksnapper

quote: They got ded big shooty guns dat’ll kill tons of boyz, but if you can get near ’em, den you’ve got a chance.
speaker: Warlord Skarmork

quote: I’se got ’da teef, I’se got ’da loot, I’se got ’da dakka, an’ I’se got ’dis ’ere mega-armour. ’Dat’s why wot I sez goes aroun’ ’ere, ya runty Grots.
speaker: Bawbag Gitstompa, Meganob
source: Only War: Enemies of the Imperium, pg. 52

quote: All Orks is equal, but some Orks are more equal dan uvvas.
speaker: Goff Warboss Bugrat Skumdreg

quote: Travellin’ through space is borin’… One time we had some bloody great ugly fing come straight out of Weird Lugwort’s ’ed! … Space is a pretty good larf.
speaker: Bigmaw, Ork Runtherd

quote: Bought me a deffblasta off Rotskrag earlier. Nice little killa. Just ask Rotskrag, hur hur.
speaker: Fat Druzka, Flash Git

quote: We’s stomped ’umies, we’s blown up stuff… We’s gonna come back next year!
speaker: Bugsplatta Defnik (Speed Freek)

quote: Boss, boss? Shouldn’t we ’ave appeared over dere?
speaker: Dagskar Snotgob (Gretchin Slaver)

quote: ‘Ere’s wot we’s gonna do, right? First I’se gonna yell Waaagh!… ‘Den we’ll all krump togevva! It’s a great plan, innit?
speaker: Flikka Hammahead, Blood Axes Nob
source: Only War: Enemies of the Imperium, pg. 47

quote: Well, yer gots yer Boyz, ’den yer gots yer Oddboyz, see? Dey can loot an’ krump wit’ da best uv ’em, tho.
speaker: Jezza, Blood Axe Stormboy
source: Only War: Enemies of the Imperium, pg. 48

quote: We’re safe ’ere, Gobbitz. There’s no way da beakies can get to us at the top of dis cliff…
speaker: Gibly the Gretchin

quote: Yar! Oose da biggest an’ da baddest now, eh? I’ll show ya, I’ll show ya all! Just try an’ stop me!
speaker: Grabthroat Shinkicka (Killa Kan pilot)
source: Only War: Enemies of the Imperium, pg. 54

quote: Don’t poke at ’der Squiggoths ya snotling-brained oaf! Dey don’t like it, an’ it hurts ’der feelins.
speaker: Zargoz, Snakebites Runtherd
source: Only War: Enemies of the Imperium, pg. 58

quote: Us Blood Axes have learnt a lot from da humies. How best ta kill ’em, fer example.
speaker: Korporal Snagbrat (Blood Axes)

quote: I’m da hand of Gork and Mork… Orks is meant ta conquer and make slaves of everyfing they don’t kill. I iz da profit of da Waaagh an whole worlds burn in me boot prints.
speaker: Ghazghkull Mag Uruk Thraka

quote: Da boss already et ’af a dozen uv ’im Squigs, kilt tree uv ’im Nobz… Dis is a good day.
speaker: Borzash Geargrinda, Big Mek
source: Only War: Enemies of the Imperium, pg. 48

quote: Wot’s faster than a warbuggy, more killy than a warbike, an’ flies froo da air like a bird? I got no bleedin’ idea, but I’m gonna find out.
speaker: Kog da Flymek

quote: Look lads, dose stoopid oomies left a bomb behind… Luzgit, help me pull dis fing free.
speaker: Nekbrekka, Warboss

quote: I’z smashed ’umies an’ panzies an’ dogfaces; I’m gonna smash anyfing wot gets in my way… Nuffin kan stop me!
speaker: Morgaash Kulgraz, Warlord of Undred-Undred Teef
source: Rogue Trader: Into the Storm, pg. 58

quote: Da only lost race I ever heard of woz when Hef crashed his trike in da final stretch… Cost me a few teef, dat.
speaker: Nuzzgrond of the Black Skulls

quote: Dere’s jus’ one fing wiv kans wot ya ‘av ta bovver about—Sittin’ on dat spring gives ya piles!
speaker: Ork Dreadnought Ace ‘Jip’ Gobsmak

quote: Right, first I’ll take those teef out fer ya… dat should help ease da pain in yer leg.
speaker: Grokkit & Dok Gutslash (exchange)

quote: Da ooman base iz got walls an’ fings, see… when you’z lot ‘ears sumfing go boom, you charge! Cos dere’ll be an ‘ole in da wall.
speaker: Snikskin, Ork Kommando
source: Rogue Trader: Into the Storm, pg. 92

quote: Not enuff nails? … Nah, I put da little feller in upside down.
speaker: Doc Hacksore

quote: Humies is all weak scum dat deserve ta get stomped. ’Cept fer One-Eye Yarrick.
speaker: Ghazghkull Mag Uruk Thraka

quote: Orkz is made fer two fings! Fightin’, an’ winnin’!
speaker: Nob’s Maxim (Unattributed)

quote: Orkses is never defeated in battle. If we win we win, if we die we die fightin’ so it don’t count…
speaker: Common Ork Saying

quote: Oi! Stop runnin’ away, yer snivellin’ humies, we got a race on ’ere!
speaker: Skabgutz, Ork Trukk Boy

quote: Hur, hur, hur… look at Lubdog’s lads gettin’ all killed off.
speaker: Buzzgob da Burna Boy

quote: Oomans are pink an’ soft, not tough an’ green like da Boyz. They’z always arguin’ about who’s da boss…
speaker: Oomies & Unity (Unattributed Ork)
source: Codex: Orks (4th Edition), pg. 40; Waaargh: Orks, pg. 81

quote: DOK! Me arm got shot off! Gimme a new ’un!
speaker: Wortgrod Mugskab
source: Rogue Trader: Into the Storm, pg. 58

quote: Look at me flash, Boss!
speaker: Ork Flash Git (Unattributed)

quote: I dunno wot you been told / Stormboy mobs is mighty bold…
speaker: “Waaagh!” Drill (Stormboy Chants)

quote: Cast off the shackles of your slumber! The galaxy shall be ours once again!
speaker: Anrakyr the Traveller
source: Legions of Death (Conquest Card Game Teaser)

quote: Our people are awakening, and soon all of the galaxy shall be ours once more.
speaker: Anrakyr the Traveller
source: Legions of Death (Conquest Card Game Teaser)

quote: Order. Unity. Obedience. We taught the galaxy these things long ago, and we will do so again.
speaker: Imotekh the Stormlord
source: Legions of Death (Conquest Card Game Teaser)

quote: All life will tear itself apart by my command.
speaker: Nahumekh, Necron Lord
source: Legions of Death (Conquest Card Game Teaser)

quote: They will seek to harvest us at first… Then they will turn their efforts to enslaving the survivors. We must choose unity or death.
speaker: Maechu, Farseer

quote: The secrets of the universe are within my grasp. You cannot stop me now.
speaker: Illuminor Szeras
source: Searching For Truth (Conquest Card Game Teaser)

quote: There will come a time when stygian night never ends… the beings that hid like shadows will feed on us forever.
speaker: Adept Corteswain

quote: When the end comes it will be not at the hand of any mortal being… Death will come at the hands of the ancients, those who determined our fate aeons before.
speaker: Inquisitor Hoth

quote: We are less than cattle to these beings… There is not one amongst them that would pay heed to a world of Man as I would to an ant on my boot.
speaker: Inquisitor Kessel

quote: Ha! The Imperium is a big place… Nothing can truly hurt us here.
speaker: Lord Magister Ithax Stroam

quote: Lucky creatures. At long last you have found the tranquility of death. I was like you, once, clinging to life and blind to the truth.
speaker: Tomas Macabee, Necron Pariah (1)
source: Dawn of War: Dark Crusade (Thur’Abis Plateau entry)

quote: So come, poor victims of life. We will grant you tranquility in these crypts. Kronus will be a Tomb World once more.
speaker: Tomas Macabee, Necron Pariah (2)

quote: The Machine is strong. We must purge the weak, hated flesh… Punish the flesh. Iron in mind and body. Hail the Machine!
speaker: Paullian Blantar (Iron Hands)
source: Codex: Necrons (3rd Edition), p. 2 (Ironically placed here)

quote: It was silent as the void… Those it came near took their own lives rather than endure its hellish presence.
speaker: Morillia, Harlequin Shadowseer

quote: The Yngir, who have slept since the birth of Chaos, shall crawl once more from their tombs, thirsting for warmth… The galaxy shall mourn.
speaker: Farseer Lsathranil (excerpt)
source: Codex: Necrons (3rd Edition), p. 5 (ominous prophecy, dark irony)

quote: Any hopes, dreams or promises of salvation are naught but dust in the wind.
speaker: Unattributed (Dogma Ommiastra)

quote: Nothing can truly hurt us here. It matters not.
speaker: Lord Magister Ithax Stroam

quote: Death stands above me, whispering low… There is only pain and fear.
speaker: Excerpt from Cthelmax walls

quote: They will be hungry after their long sleep… then they will turn to enslaving the survivors.
speaker: Maechu, Farseer

quote: We are born for a darker purpose than that of mere existence.
speaker: Adept Corteswain

quote: We taught the galaxy these things long ago, and we will do so again.” (Emphasizing the unstoppable reclamation of their old dominion)
speaker: Imotekh the Stormlord
source: Legions of Death (Conquest Card Game Teaser)

quote: How could I, a respected scientist… turn my back on the civilization that has given me so much? The answer is simple. I have done everything in the name of purity.
speaker: Tomas Macabee, Necron Pariah
source: Dawn of War: Dark Crusade (broadcast message)

quote: The galaxy shall be ours once again!
speaker: Anrakyr the Traveller
source: Legions of Death (Conquest Card Game Teaser)

quote: They will seek to harvest us at first… Then they will turn their efforts to enslaving the survivors.” (Describing the monstrous extent of Necron plans)
speaker: Maechu, Farseer

quote: The War in Heaven shall be as nothing to their vengeance… The galaxy shall run red as the blood of Eldanesh.
speaker: Farseer Lsathranil’s Prophecy

quote: It drifted above us with slow, liquid grace, and its gaze caused madness and despair… [they] took their own lives rather than endure its hellish presence.
speaker: Morillia, Harlequin Shadowseer

quote: Any hopes, dreams… are naught but dust in the wind.
speaker: Unattributed (Dogma Ommiastra)

quote: Death stands above me… There is only pain and fear.
speaker: Excerpt from Cthelmax

quote: Cast off the shackles of your slumber!
speaker: Anrakyr the Traveller

quote: Order. Unity. Obedience.
speaker: Imotekh the Stormlord

quote: The secrets of the universe are within my grasp.
speaker: Illuminor Szeras

quote: Lucky creatures… At long last you have found the tranquility of death.
speaker: Tomas Macabee

quote: The Yngir… shall crawl once more from their tombs, thirsting for warmth.
speaker: Farseer Lsathranil

quote: Death will come at the hands of the ancients.
speaker: Inquisitor Hoth

quote: We must choose unity or death.
speaker: Maechu, Farseer
